sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, created_at DateTime64(3), data String);
SELECT id, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(created_at) AS snowflake_id FROM test_table WHERE created_at AND created_at > '2022-01-01 00:00:00.000';

SELECT dt.id, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(dt.created_at, 1288834974657) AS snowflake_id FROM test_table AS dt WHERE dt.data = 'sample2' AND dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(dt.created_at) AND dt.created_at < '2023-01-01';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(created_at) AS snowflake_id FROM test_table GROUP BY snowflake_id HAVING snowflake_id AND snowflake_id > 1000000000000000000);
CREATE TABLE another_table (value String, created_at DateTime64(3));
SELECT a.id, a.data, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(a.created_at) FROM test_table AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.created_at <= b.created_at WHERE a.id AND b.value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(MAX(a.created_at)) AS max_snowflake_id FROM test_table AS a GROUP BY a.id HAVING max_snowflake_id AND max_snowflake_id IS NOT NULL;

SELECT a.id, a.data, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(a.created_at) AS snowflake_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE another_table.created_at >= dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(a.created_at)) AS active_count FROM test_table AS a WHERE snowflake_id; DROP TABLE test_table;

SELECT a.*, b.value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT id, dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(created_at) AS snowflake_id FROM test_table WHERE id > 0) AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.snowflake_id > dateTime64ToSnowflakeID(b.created_at);
